name: Q.E.D (Quad Erat Digitandum)
description:
Core Features
- Accessible Transcription: Converts handwritten or printed notes into WCAG 2.2 AA compliant HTML.
- Smart Figure Handling: Automatically crops figures and generates AI-powered descriptions and Alt Text.
- Precision Math Rendering: Transforms complex n-dimensional manifolds into flawless, screen-reader-friendly LaTeX.
- Visual Refinement: Includes basic touch-up tools to ensure your sketches finally obey the laws of physics.
- Ad digitandum paratus.
